## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Spec in `spec/` created or updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Task detail file(s) updated (status, acceptance criteria, notes)
- [ ] `tasks/task-list.md` synchronized with task detail files
- [ ] `make validate` passes locally (pre-commit + LOOM schema + shellcheck)
- [ ] Tests updated for changed behavior; coverage threshold holds
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated if new loom-reed-light command was added

## Task / Spec Traceability

- Spec links:
- Task IDs:
- ADR (if architectural change):
